user: {"artist": {"id": "artist_12345", "name": "The Melodics", "biography": "An indie rock band from Seattle known for their melodic tunes and heartfelt lyrics.", "origin": "Seattle, Washington, USA", "genre": "Indie Rock", "years_active": "2010\u2013present", "top_streamed_tracks": [{"id": "track_001", "title": "Waves of Time", "duration_seconds": 215, "streams": 12500000, "album": "Echoes", "release_date": "2022-01-15"}, {"id": "track_002", "title": "Silent Horizon", "duration_seconds": 189, "streams": 9800000, "album": "Waves", "release_date": "2021-07-30"}], "upcoming_tour": {"tour_name": "Melodics World Tour 2024", "start_date": "2024-05-10", "end_date": "2024-09-15", "locations": [{"city": "New York", "country": "USA", "venue": "Madison Square Garden", "date": "2024-05-15"}, {"city": "London", "country": "UK", "venue": "The O2 Arena", "date": "2024-06-20"}]}}}
assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Artist Profile API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Track:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single music track'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the track'
          example: 'track_001'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the track'
          example: 'Waves of Time'
        duration_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duration of the track in seconds'
          example: 215
        streams:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of streams the track has'
          example: 12500000
        album:
          type: string
          description: 'Album name the track belongs to'
          example: 'Echoes'
        release_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Release date of the track'
          example: '2022-01-15'
    TourLocation:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a single tour location'
      properties:
        city:
          type: string
          description: 'City where the concert will be held'
          example: 'New York'
        country:
          type: string
          description: 'Country of the concert location'
          example: 'USA'
        venue:
          type: string
          description: 'Venue of the concert'
          example: 'Madison Square Garden'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of the concert'
          example: '2024-05-15'
    UpcomingTour:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about the upcoming concert tour'
      properties:
        tour_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the tour'
          example: 'Melodics World Tour 2024'
        start_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Tour start date'
          example: '2024-05-10'
        end_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Tour end date'
          example: '2024-09-15'
        locations:
          type: array
          description: 'List of tour locations and dates'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/TourLocation'
    ArtistProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Artist profile including biography, top streamed tracks, and upcoming tour'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the artist'
          example: 'artist_12345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the artist or band'
          example: 'The Melodics'
        biography:
          type: string
          description: 'Biography or description of the artist'
          example: 'An indie rock band from Seattle known for their melodic tunes and heartfelt lyrics.'
        origin:
          type: string
          description: 'Origin city and country of the artist'
          example: 'Seattle, Washington, USA'
        genre:
          type: string
          description: 'Primary genre of the artist'
          example: 'Indie Rock'
        years_active:
          type: string
          description: 'Active years of the artist'
          example: '2010–present'
        top_streamed_tracks:
          type: array
          description: 'List of top streamed tracks by the artist'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Track'
        upcoming_tour:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingTour'
  schemas:
    ArtistProfileResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response containing artist profile data'
      properties:
        artist:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArtistProfile'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Movie Details API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Director:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about the movie director'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the director'
          example: 'Christopher Nolan'
        birth_year:
          type: integer
          description: 'Year the director was born'
          example: 1970
    CastMember:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a single cast member'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the actor or actress'
          example: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'
        role:
          type: string
          description: 'Role played by the cast member in the movie'
          example: 'Dom Cobb'
    Link:
      type: object
      description: 'HATEOAS link object with target and context'
      properties:
        href:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL to the related movie resource'
          example: 'https://api.streamingplatform.com/movies/123'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the related movie'
          example: 'Interstellar'
    Links:
      type: object
      description: 'Collection of HATEOAS links related to the movie'
      properties:
        related:
          type: array
          description: 'List of related movie links'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Link'
    Movie:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete details about a movie on the streaming platform'
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the movie'
          example: 'Inception'
        runtime_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Total runtime of the movie in minutes'
          example: 148
        director:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Director'
        cast:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of cast members involved in the movie'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CastMember'
        _links:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Links'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Competitive E-Sports Match Summary
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    TeamScore:
      type: object
      description: 'Pontuação da equipe na partida'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da equipe'
          example: 'Dragons'
        score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Pontuação atual da equipe'
          example: 25
    PlayerStats:
      type: object
      description: 'Estatísticas individuais do jogador'
      properties:
        player_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do jogador'
          example: 'player_01'
        team:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da equipe do jogador'
          example: 'Dragons'
        kills:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de eliminações feitas pelo jogador'
          example: 10
        deaths:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de vezes que o jogador foi eliminado'
          example: 3
        assists:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de assistências feitas pelo jogador'
          example: 7
    MatchEvent:
      type: object
      description: 'Evento chave durante a partida'
      properties:
        timestamp_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Tempo do evento em segundos desde o início da partida'
          example: 125
        event_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de evento ocorrido'
          example: 'kill'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Descrição detalhada do evento'
          example: 'player_01 eliminou player_12'
    MatchSummary:
      type: object
      description: 'Resumo completo da partida de e-sports'
      properties:
        match_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da partida'
          example: 'match_20240612_001'
        teams:
          type: object
          description: 'Informações das equipes e suas pontuações'
          properties:
            blue_team:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TeamScore'
            red_team:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TeamScore'
        players_stats:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista das estatísticas dos jogadores'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PlayerStats'
        timeline:
          type: array
          description: 'Sequência de eventos importantes da partida'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MatchEvent'

  version: 1.0.0

  schemas:

      type: object

          description: 'Duração da faixa em segundos'
          example: 215

          description: 'Número de vezes que a faixa foi reproduzida'
          example: 2400000

      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma localização de show'
      properties:
        city:
          type: string
          description: 'Cidade onde ocorrerá o show'
          example: 'São Paulo'
        venue:
          type: string
          description: 'Local do show'
          example: 'Espaço das Américas'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data do show'
          example: '2024-09-12'
    Tour:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre uma turnê de shows'
      properties:
        tour_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da turnê'
          example: 'Turnê Brasil Encantado'
        start_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data de início da turnê'
          example: '2024-09-12'
        end_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data de término da turnê'
          example: '2024-12-05'
        locations:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de cidades e locais onde ocorrerão os shows'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
    ArtistProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Perfil completo do artista na plataforma de streaming'

        artist_id:

          description: 'Identificador único do artista'

          description: 'Nome do artista'
          example: 'Lúcia Martins'
        biography:
          type: string
          description: 'Biografia resumida do artista'
          example: 'Cantora e compositora brasileira de MPB, com carreira iniciada nos anos 90.'
        top_streamed_tracks:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista das faixas mais reproduzidas do artista'
          items:

        upcoming_tour:

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Demographics information of the patient'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the patient'
          example: 'P123456789'
        first_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Patient''s first name'
          example: 'John'
        last_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Patient''s last name'
          example: 'Doe'
        date_of_birth:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Patient''s date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format'
          example: '1980-05-15'
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Patient''s gender'
          example: 'male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Reference normal range values for a biomarker'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Minimum expected normal value for the biomarker'
          example: 13.5
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Maximum expected normal value for the biomarker'
          example: 17.5
    BloodBiomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Blood biomarker result with measured value and normal range'
      properties:
        biomarker:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the blood biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker in the specified unit'
          example: 14.5
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of the biomarker value'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Information related to the reviewing pathologist signature'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the reviewing pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Smith'
        signature_image:
          type: string
          description: 'Base64 encoded digital signature image of the pathologist with data URI prefix'
          example: 'data:image/png;base64,'
    LaboratoryTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete laboratory test result including patient info, blood biomarkers, and reviewer signature'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientDemographics'
        blood_biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'List of blood biomarkers measured in the test'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BloodBiomarker'
        reviewing_pathologist:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: E-Sports Match Summary API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Team:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a competing team'
      properties:
        team_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the team'
          example: 'team_alpha'
        team_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Official team name'
          example: 'Alpha Warriors'
        score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Final score achieved by the team in the match'
          example: 15
    PlayerStats:
      type: object
      description: 'Statistics for an individual player in the match'
      properties:
        player_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique player identifier'
          example: 'player_1'
        player_name:
          type: string
          description: 'In-game name of the player'
          example: 'SharpShooter'
        team_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier of the player’s team'
          example: 'team_alpha'
        kills:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of kills made by the player'
          example: 10
        deaths:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of times the player died'
          example: 4
        assists:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of assists made by the player'
          example: 7
    MatchEvent:
      type: object
      description: 'Key timed event during the match'
      properties:
        timestamp:
          type: string
          description: 'Time elapsed since match start when the event occurred in mm:ss format'
          example: '00:02:15'
        event_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type/category of the match event'
          example: 'kill'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Narrative description of the event'
          example: 'SharpShooter eliminated SilentBlade'
    MatchSummary:
      type: object
      description: 'Summary of a competitive e-sports match including teams, player stats, and timeline events'
      properties:
        match_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the match'
          example: 'match_12345'
        teams:
          type: array
          description: 'List of teams and their scores'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Team'
        players_stats:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of individual player statistics for the match'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PlayerStats'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Student Progress Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    QuizScore:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of an individual quiz score'
      properties:
        quiz_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the quiz'
          example: 'quiz_001'
        score_percentage:
          type: integer
          description: 'Score achieved on the quiz as a percentage'
          example: 85
        max_score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Maximum possible score for the quiz'
          example: 100
        date_taken:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the quiz was taken'
          example: '2024-05-10'
    Certificate:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about an unlocked digital certificate'
      properties:
        certificate_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique certificate identifier'
          example: 'cert_101'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the certificate'
          example: 'Introduction to AI'
        issue_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the certificate was issued'
          example: '2024-05-20'
        validity_period_days:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of days the certificate remains valid'
          example: 365
    StudentProgressReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Report of student progress within a course'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the student'
          example: 'stu_12345'
        course_completion_percentage:
          type: integer
          description: 'Overall completion percentage of the course'
          example: 76
        quiz_scores:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the student''s quiz scores within the course'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/QuizScore'
        unlocked_certificates:
          type: array
          description: 'List of certificates the student has unlocked'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Certificate'

          description: 'Anatomical position of the tooth in the mouth'

        condition:
          type: string

          example: 'Filled'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes about the tooth condition or treatment'
          example: 'Composite filling on occlusal surface'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a past dental procedure'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the procedure'
          example: 'PROC12345'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date the procedure was performed'
          example: '2023-10-15'
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type or name of the dental procedure'

          type: string

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Fintech Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Merchant:
      type: object
      description: 'Merchant information related to a transaction'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Merchant or payee name'
          example: 'Whole Foods'
        category:
          type: string
          description: 'Category of the merchant or service'
          example: 'Groceries'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single wallet transaction'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'tx1001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 date and time of the transaction'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:20:30Z'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Transaction amount; negative for debit, positive for credit'
          example: -150.25
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code following ISO 4217'
          example: 'USD'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Short description or memo for the transaction'
          example: 'Grocery Shopping'
        merchant:
          oneOf:
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Merchant'
            - type: 'null'
          description: 'Optional merchant info if applicable'
          example:
            name: 'Whole Foods'
            category: 'Groceries'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current processing status of the transaction'
          example: 'Completed'
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Profile information of the wallet user'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the user'
          example: 'user_987'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the user'
          example: '+1234567890'
    WalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital wallet statement with balance, user profile, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current balance available in the digital wallet'
          example: 2540.75
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the last three recent transactions in the wallet'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

      properties:

          description: 'Identificador único da faixa'

        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título da faixa'
          example: 'Noite Carioca'
        duration_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duração da faixa em segundos'
          example: 210
        streams:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número total de streams da faixa'
          example: 1540000
    ConcertDate:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma data de concerto da turnê'
      properties:
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data do concerto (formato ISO 8601)'
          example: '2024-07-15'
        city:
          type: string
          description: 'Cidade onde ocorrerá o concerto'
          example: 'Rio de Janeiro'
        venue:
          type: string
          description: 'Local do concerto'
          example: 'Teatro Municipal'
    UpcomingTour:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre a turnê de concertos futura'
      properties:
        tour_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome oficial da turnê'
          example: 'Samba Jazz Tour 2024'
        dates:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de datas e locais dos concertos'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ConcertDate'
    ArtistProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Perfil completo do artista incluindo biografia, top faixas e turnê'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do artista'
          example: 'artist_123'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do artista'
          example: 'Mariana Silva'
        biography:

          description: 'Biografia do artista'

        top_streamed_tracks:

          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Track'
        upcoming_tour:

    ArtistProfileResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta contendo o perfil completo do artista'
      properties:
        artist_profile:

info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Patient:
      type: object
      description: 'Patient demographics information'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique patient identifier'
          example: '123456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        date_of_birth:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Patient date of birth in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '1985-04-12'
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Patient gender'
          example: 'Male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Normal range for a blood biomarker'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Minimum normal value for the biomarker'
          example: 13.0
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Maximum normal value for the biomarker'
          example: 17.0
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of measurement corresponding to the normal range'
          example: 'g/dL'
    BiomarkerResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Blood biomarker test result with value and normal range'
      properties:
        biomarker_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the blood biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker'
          example: 13.7
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of measurement for the biomarker value'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital signature information of the reviewing pathologist'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Smith'
        signed_at:

info:
  title: Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Merchant:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the merchant involved in the transaction'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the merchant'
          example: 'SuperMart'
        category:
          type: string
          description: 'Category of the merchant business'
          example: 'Groceries'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'A recent transaction in the wallet statement'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the transaction'
          example: 'txn_9001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 datetime of the transaction'
          example: '2024-06-01T14:20:00Z'
        amount:
          type: number
          description: 'Amount of the transaction, positive for credits and negative for debits'
          example: -120.5
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code of the transaction amount'
          example: 'USD'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Explanation or memo of the transaction'
          example: 'Grocery shopping'
        merchant:
          anyOf:
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Merchant'
            - type: 'null'
          description: 'Merchant details, null if not applicable'
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'User profile details linked to the wallet'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'user_1001'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'User full name'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the user'
          example: '+1234567890'
    WalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital wallet statement including balance, profile, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        current_balance:
          type: number
          description: 'Current available balance in the wallet'
          example: 2540.75
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code for the balance'
          example: 'USD'
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the last three recent transactions'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

          description: 'Legenda descritiva do recurso'
          example: 'Painel de controle futurístico'
    DigitalNewsArticle:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta da notícia digital com conteúdo principal e objetos relacionados'
      properties:
        headline:
          type: string
          description: 'Título principal da notícia'
          example: 'Inovações Tecnológicas Transformam o Mercado'
        author:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Author'
        multimedia:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de recursos multimídia incorporados na notícia'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MultimediaAsset'
        tags:
          type: array
          description: 'Tags relacionadas à notícia para categorização'
          items:
            type: string
            description: 'Tag individual relacionada à notícia'
            example: 'tecnologia'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Patient:
      type: object
      description: 'Patient demographic information'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique patient identifier'
          example: 'pat_123456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Age of the patient in years'
          example: 45
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gender of the patient'
          example: 'Male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Reference range for a biomarker value'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Minimum normal value'
          example: 13.5
        max:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Maximum normal value'
          example: 17.5
    TestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Individual blood biomarker test result'
      properties:
        biomarker:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the biomarker tested'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker'
          example: 14.2
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of measurement for the biomarker value'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    Pathologist:
      type: object
      description: 'Reviewing pathologist information along with digital signature'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Emily Saunders'
        digital_signature:
          type: string
          description: 'Base64-encoded digital signature of the pathologist'
          example: 'MEUCIQD2xK7n8lWJgZ5HdHuJpWFFiUVRRL0q7aNcMxuBwWkW2yQIgQ8R7GcX59cn3P9rxn29jSUNEQxkUwGlWbn+MUEmQF1i8='
    LaboratoryTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete hospital laboratory test result including patient data, biomarkers, and pathologist signature'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Patient'
        test_results:
          type: array
          description: 'List of blood biomarker test results'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/TestResult'
        pathologist:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pathologist'

system: Você é um Arquiteto de Software especialista em documentação de APIs. Converta o JSON de entrada em uma especificação OpenAPI 3.0 em formato YAML. Estruture corretamente os componentes (schemas) e garanta a tipagem rigorosa. Retorne APENAS o código YAML válido, sem comentários adicionais.
user: {"patient": {"id": "pt_12345", "name": "Jo\u00e3o Silva", "date_of_birth": "1980-05-15", "gender": "male"}, "test_results": [{"biomarker": "Hemoglobin", "value": 14.5, "unit": "g/dL", "normal_range": {"min": 13.5, "max": 17.5}}, {"biomarker": "White Blood Cell Count", "value": 6.2, "unit": "10^3/uL", "normal_range": {"min": 4.0, "max": 11.0}}, {"biomarker": "Platelet Count", "value": 250, "unit": "10^3/uL", "normal_range": {"min": 150, "max": 450}}], "pathologist_signature": {"name": "Dra. Mariana Costa", "signature_image_url": "https://hospital.com/signatures/mariana_costa.png", "signed_at": "2024-06-01T15:30:00Z"}}
assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Patient:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes demográficos do paciente'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do paciente'
          example: 'pt_12345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do paciente'
          example: 'João Silva'
        date_of_birth:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data de nascimento do paciente'
          example: '1980-05-15'
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gênero do paciente'
          example: 'male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Faixa normal para um biomarcador específico'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor mínimo normal'
          example: 13.5
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor máximo normal'
          example: 17.5
    BiomarkerResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Resultado de um biomarcador sanguíneo'
      properties:
        biomarker:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do biomarcador'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor medido do biomarcador'
          example: 14.5
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unidade de medida do valor'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Assinatura digital do patologista responsável'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do patologista'
          example: 'Dra. Mariana Costa'
        signature_image_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL da imagem da assinatura digital'
          example: 'https://hospital.com/signatures/mariana_costa.png'
        signed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora em que o teste foi assinado'
          example: '2024-06-01T15:30:00Z'
    LaboratoryTestResultResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resultado completo do exame laboratorial do paciente'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Patient'
        test_results:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de biomarcadores sanguíneos e seus resultados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BiomarkerResult'
        pathologist_signature:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Relatório da Câmera de Trânsito da Cidade Inteligente
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    VeiculoDetectado:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre um tipo específico de veículo detectado na interseção'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de veículo detectado'
          example: 'car'
        count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade de veículos deste tipo detectados'
          example: 34
        average_speed_kmh:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Velocidade média dos veículos em km/h'
          example: 15.2
    AlertaPedestre:
      type: object
      description: 'Alerta ativo para uma passagem de pedestres específica'
      properties:
        crossing_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da passagem de pedestres'
          example: 'CRS001'
        alert_active:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o alerta está ativo ou não'
          example: true
        time_to_clear_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Tempo em segundos até a passagem estar livre'
          example: 35
    RelatorioIntersecao:
      type: object
      description: 'Relatório detalhado de congestionamento, veículos detectados e alertas de passagem de pedestres em uma interseção'
      properties:
        intersection_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da interseção'
          example: 'INT12345'
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora em que o relatório foi gerado'
          example: '2024-04-27T15:30:00Z'
        congestion_level:
          type: string
          description: 'Nível de congestionamento da interseção'
          example: 'high'
        vehicles_detected:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos tipos de veículos detectados na interseção'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/VeiculoDetectado'
        pedestrian_crossing_alerts:
          type: array
          description: 'Alertas ativos para as passagens de pedestres na interseção'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AlertaPedestre'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Demographic details of the patient'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique patient identifier'
          example: 'pat_789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Age of the patient in years'
          example: 45
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gender of the patient'
          example: 'Male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Normal reference range for a biomarker'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Minimum normal value'
          example: 13.5
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Maximum normal value'
          example: 17.5
    Biomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Individual blood biomarker result'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker'
          example: 14.2
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of measurement for the biomarker'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    LaboratoryTest:
      type: object
      description: 'Laboratory test details including biomarkers'
      properties:
        test_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the test'
          example: 'test_456'
        test_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the laboratory test'
          example: 'Comprehensive Blood Panel'
        biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of blood biomarkers measured in the test'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Biomarker'
    ReviewingPathologist:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the pathologist reviewing the test'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Smith'
        signature:
          type: string
          description: 'Digital signature of the pathologist in base64 encoding'
          example: 'digi_signature_base64_encoded_string_here'
    LaboratoryTestResultResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Full laboratory test result including patient, test, biomarkers and reviewing pathologist'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientDemographics'
        laboratory_test:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/LaboratoryTest'
        reviewing_pathologist:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReviewingPathologist'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Logistics Fleet Tracking
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: GPS coordinates representation
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Latitude coordinate
          example: 40.712776
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Longitude coordinate
          example: -74.005974
    Driver:
      type: object
      description: Driver information details
      properties:
        driverId:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the driver
          example: drv_5678
        name:
          type: string
          description: Full name of the driver
          example: John Doe
        licenseNumber:
          type: string
          description: Driver's license number
          example: D1234567
    RouteStop:
      type: object
      description: Individual stop details in delivery route
      properties:
        stopId:
          type: string
          description: Unique stop identifier
          example: stop_1
        address:
          type: string
          description: Physical address of the stop
          example: 123 Main St, New York, NY
        scheduledArrival:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Scheduled arrival time in ISO 8601 format
          example: '2024-06-20T10:30:00Z'
        status:
          type: string
          description: Current status of the stop
          example: pending
    FleetTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: Response object for a delivery truck's current status
      properties:
        truckId:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the truck
          example: truck_1234
        currentLocation:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speedKph:
          type: integer
          description: Current speed of the truck in kilometers per hour
          example: 65
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Driver'
        routeStops:
          type: array
          description: List of stops on the delivery route
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RouteStop'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Cloud Infrastructure Billing Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CostDetail:
      type: object
      description: 'Detailed cost entry for an individual resource'
      properties:
        resource:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the resource incurring cost'
          example: 'VM Instance A'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Cost amount in USD'
          example: 3200.50
    ServiceCost:
      type: object
      description: 'Cost breakdown by individual cloud service'
      properties:
        service_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the cloud service'
          example: 'compute'
        costs:
          type: array
          description: 'List of cost details for this service'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CostDetail'
    ProjectedForecast:
      type: object
      description: 'Forecasted cloud spend for a future month'
      properties:
        month:
          type: string
          description: 'Month of the projected forecast in YYYY-MM format'
          example: '2024-07'
        projected_spend:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Projected cloud spend amount in USD'
          example: 13000.00
    BillingDashboardResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Cloud infrastructure billing dashboard response structure'
      properties:
        total_monthly_spend:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Total cloud spend for the current month in USD'
          example: 12500.75
        costs_by_service:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of costs broken down by individual cloud services'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ServiceCost'
        projected_forecasts:
          type: array
          description: 'List of projected forecasts for upcoming months'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProjectedForecast'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Restaurant Reservation Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    DietaryRestrictions:
      type: object
      description: 'Restrições alimentares específicas do cliente'
      properties:
        gluten_free:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente é intolerante ao glúten'
          example: true
        vegan:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente segue uma dieta vegana'
          example: false
        nut_allergy:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente tem alergia a nozes'
          example: true
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do cliente e suas restrições alimentares'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do cliente'
          example: 'Lucas Pereira'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreorderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um item pré-encomendado pelo cliente'
      properties:
        item_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do item'
          example: 'pasta_01'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do prato ou item pré-encomendado'
          example: 'Spaghetti Carbonara'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade do item pré-encomendado'
          example: 2
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta da API contendo detalhes da reserva no restaurante'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número da mesa reservada no restaurante'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        preordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de itens que foram pré-encomendados pelo cliente'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreorderedItem'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about the wallet user profile'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the user'
          example: 'user_12345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the user'
          example: '+1234567890'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single transaction in the wallet'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'txn_1001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Date and time when the transaction occurred, in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-04-25T14:30:00Z'
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Indicates if the transaction is a debit or credit'
          example: 'debit'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Amount of money debited or credited in the transaction'
          example: 120.50
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code following ISO 4217'
          example: 'USD'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Brief description or memo for the transaction'
          example: 'Grocery shopping'
    DigitalWalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete digital wallet statement including user profile, balance, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current balance available in the digital wallet'
          example: 2540.75
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the last three transactions executed in the wallet'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Smart City Traffic Camera Report API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    VehicleDetail:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes específicos de um veículo detectado'
      properties:
        make:
          type: string
          description: 'Marca do veículo'
          example: 'Toyota'
        model:
          type: string
          description: 'Modelo do veículo'
          example: 'Corolla'
        license_plate:
          type: string
          description: 'Placa do veículo'
          example: 'ABC-1234'
    DetectedVehicle:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre um tipo específico de veículo detectado'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de veículo detectado'
          example: 'Car'
        count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade de veículos desse tipo presentes'
          example: 23
        details:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos detalhes de cada veículo individual'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/VehicleDetail'
    PedestrianCrossingAlert:
      type: object
      description: 'Alerta de travessia de pedestre ativo ou inativo'
      properties:
        crossing_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da faixa de pedestre'
          example: 'cross_1'
        active:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Estado atual do alerta de travessia (ativo/inativo)'
          example: true
        time_elapsed_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Tempo em segundos desde que o alerta foi ativado'
          example: 35
    TrafficCameraReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Relatório da câmera de tráfego inteligente da cidade'
      properties:
        intersection_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do cruzamento monitorado'
          example: 'int_12345'
        congestion_level:
          type: string
          description: 'Nível atual de congestionamento do cruzamento'
          example: 'High'
        detected_vehicles:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos tipos de veículos detectados e suas quantidades'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DetectedVehicle'
        pedestrian_crossing_alerts:
          type: array
          description: 'Alertas ativos ou inativos nas faixas de pedestre'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PedestrianCrossingAlert'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Fleet Tracking API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Coordenadas GPS atuais do veículo'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Latitude geográfica do veículo'
          example: -23.55052
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Longitude geográfica do veículo'
          example: -46.633308
    DriverInfo:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o motorista do caminhão'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do motorista'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número da licença de condução do motorista'
          example: 'XYZ987654'
        contact:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de contato do motorista'
          example: '+55 11 99999-8888'
    Stop:
      type: object
      description: 'Ponto de parada na rota de entrega'
      properties:
        stop_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da parada'
          example: 'STOP001'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço completo da parada'
          example: 'Rua Augusta, 1234, São Paulo, SP'
        scheduled_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário previsto para chegada na parada'
          example: '2024-06-10T14:00:00Z'
        completed:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se a parada foi concluída'
          example: true
    FleetTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta contendo a localização e status do caminhão de entrega'
      properties:
        truck_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do caminhão'
          example: 'TRUCK123'
        location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speed_kmh:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Velocidade atual do caminhão em km/h'
          example: 65.2
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DriverInfo'
        stops:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de paradas previstas na rota'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Stop'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Relatório de Disponibilidade de Mesas em Coworking
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    User:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o usuário que ocupa a mesa ou fez a reserva'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do usuário'
          example: 'user_123'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do usuário'
          example: 'Lucas Silva'
    HotDeskOccupied:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações da mesa hot-desk atualmente ocupada'
      properties:
        desk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da mesa'
          example: 'HD101'
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        occupied_since:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário em que a mesa começou a ser ocupada'
          example: '2024-06-26T08:30:00Z'
    Floor:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o andar e suas mesas hot-desk ocupadas'
      properties:
        floor_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do andar'
          example: 'floor_1'
        floor_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome ou descrição do andar'
          example: 'Primeiro Andar'
        hot_desks_occupied:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de mesas hot-desk atualmente ocupadas no andar'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/HotDeskOccupied'
    MeetingRoomReservation:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma reserva futura de sala de reunião'
      properties:
        reservation_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da reserva'
          example: 'res_001'
        room_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da sala de reunião reservada'
          example: 'Sala de Reunião Alpha'
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário de início da reserva'
          example: '2024-06-26T11:00:00Z'
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário de término da reserva'
          example: '2024-06-26T12:00:00Z'
        reserved_by:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
    DeskAvailabilityReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Relatório completo mostrando a disponibilidade das mesas e reservas de salas'
      properties:
        report_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora do relatório'
          example: '2024-06-26T10:00:00Z'
        floors:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de andares com as mesas hot-desk ocupadas'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Floor'
        upcoming_meeting_room_reservations:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de reservas futuras para salas de reunião'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MeetingRoomReservation'

          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'txn_001'

          type: string
          format: date-time

          example: '2024-06-10T14:23:00Z'

          type: string
          description: 'Brief description or memo for the transaction'

system: Você é um Arquiteto de Software especialista em documentação de APIs. Converta o JSON de entrada em uma especificação OpenAPI 3.0 em formato YAML. Estruture corretamente os componentes (schemas) e garanta a tipagem rigorosa. Retorne APENAS o código YAML válido, sem comentários adicionais.
user: {"applicant_credit_score": 720, "property_valuation": {"estimated_value": 350000, "valuation_date": "2024-04-20", "appraiser": {"name": "Carlos Pereira", "license_number": "AP123456BR"}}, "required_compliance_documents": [{"document_type": "Proof of Income", "document_status": "Pending"}, {"document_type": "ID Verification", "document_status": "Received"}]}
assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Mortgage Loan Application Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Appraiser:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do avaliador da propriedade'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do avaliador'
          example: 'Carlos Pereira'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número da licença profissional do avaliador'
          example: 'AP123456BR'
    PropertyValuation:
      type: object
      description: 'Avaliação detalhada da propriedade em questão'
      properties:
        estimated_value:
          type: integer
          description: 'Valor estimado da propriedade em moeda local'
          example: 350000
        valuation_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que a avaliação foi realizada'
          example: '2024-04-20'
        appraiser:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Appraiser'
    ComplianceDocument:
      type: object
      description: 'Documento necessário para conformidade da aplicação'
      properties:
        document_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de documento solicitado'
          example: 'Proof of Income'
        document_status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual do documento requerido'
          example: 'Pending'
    MortgageLoanApplicationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta detalhada da aplicação do empréstimo hipotecário'
      properties:
        applicant_credit_score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Pontuação de crédito do solicitante'
          example: 720
        property_valuation:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PropertyValuation'
        required_compliance_documents:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de documentos exigidos para conformidade'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ComplianceDocument'
paths: {}

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Property Listing API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ArchitectureSpec:
      type: object
      description: 'Especificações arquitetônicas da propriedade'
      properties:
        style:
          type: string
          description: 'Estilo arquitetônico da propriedade'
          example: 'Contemporary'
        year_built:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano em que a propriedade foi construída'
          example: 2018
        floor_count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de andares da propriedade'
          example: 2
        area_sqm:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Área total em metros quadrados'
          example: 250.5
    Image:
      type: object
      description: 'Imagem em alta resolução da propriedade'
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL da imagem em alta resolução'
          example: 'https://example.com/images/property_9876/front_view_highres.jpg'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Descrição breve da imagem'
          example: 'Front view of the house'
    RealtorContact:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações de contato do corretor'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do corretor'
          example: 'realt_3321'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do corretor'
          example: 'Carlos Eduardo'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de telefone para contato'
          example: '+55 11 91234-5678'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Endereço de email para contato'
          example: 'carlos.eduardo@realestate.com.br'
    PropertyListing:
      type: object
      description: 'Lista de propriedades imobiliárias detalhadas'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da propriedade'
          example: 'prop_9876'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título breve da propriedade'
          example: 'Modern Family House'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Descrição detalhada da propriedade'
          example: 'Spacious 4-bedroom house with garden and swimming pool'
        price:
          type: integer
          description: 'Preço de venda da propriedade em reais'
          example: 850000
        architecture:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArchitectureSpec'
        images:
          type: array
          description: 'Conjunto de imagens em alta resolução'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Image'
        realtor:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/RealtorContact'

info:
  title: Logistics Fleet Tracking Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Coordenadas GPS atuais do veículo de entrega'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude em graus decimais'
          example: -23.55052
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude em graus decimais'
          example: -46.633308
    Driver:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do motorista do caminhão'
      properties:
        driver_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do motorista'
          example: 'drv_456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do motorista'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        contact_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de contato do motorista'
          example: '+5511999998888'
    RouteStop:
      type: object
      description: 'Paradas planejadas na rota do caminhão'
      properties:
        stop_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da parada'
          example: 'stop_1'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço da parada'
          example: 'Rua da Consolação, 1000, São Paulo, SP'
        estimated_arrival:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Tempo estimado de chegada na parada (formato ISO 8601)'
          example: '2024-06-26T15:30:00Z'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual da parada na rota'
          example: 'pending'
    FleetTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta detalhada do rastreamento da frota logística'
      properties:
        truck_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do caminhão de entrega'
          example: 'truck_123'
        location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speed_kmh:
          type: integer
          description: 'Velocidade atual do caminhão em quilômetros por hora'
          example: 65
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Driver'
        route_stops:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de paradas na rota do caminhão'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RouteStop'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Tooth:
      type: object
      description: 'Representation of a single tooth and its condition'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Universal tooth number based on dental notation'
          example: '18'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Current condition or diagnosis of the tooth'
          example: 'Cavity'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional remarks about the tooth condition'
          example: 'Needs filling'
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Anatomical chart of teeth with conditions'
      properties:
        teeth:
          type: array
          description: 'List of individual teeth and their status'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Tooth'
    PastProcedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a previously performed dental procedure'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the procedure'
          example: 'proc_1001'
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dental procedure performed'
          example: 'Cavity Filling'
        date_performed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the procedure was completed'
          example: '2023-02-14'
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: 'Tooth involved in the procedure, if applicable'
          example: '18'
        dentist:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dentist who performed the procedure'
          example: 'Dr. Lisa P.'
    UpcomingCleaningMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadata related to upcoming scheduled tooth cleaning'
      properties:
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if a reminder has been sent to the patient'
          example: true
        reminder_method:
          type: string
          description: 'Method used to send the reminder notification'
          example: 'email'
    UpcomingCleanings:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the patient\'s next scheduled cleaning'
      properties:
        next_cleaning_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date for the upcoming dental cleaning appointment'
          example: '2024-07-01'
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningMetadata'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete dental patient history including tooth chart, past procedures, and upcoming cleanings'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the patient'
          example: 'pat_3245'
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'List of past dental procedures undergone by the patient'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PastProcedure'
        upcoming_cleanings:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleanings'
paths: {}

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Logistics Fleet Tracking Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Objeto contendo as coordenadas GPS atuais do caminhão'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Latitude atual do caminhão'
          example: -23.55052
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Longitude atual do caminhão'
          example: -46.633308
    Driver:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o motorista do caminhão'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do motorista'
          example: 'drv_45'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do motorista'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        licenseNumber:
          type: string
          description: 'Número da carteira de habilitação do motorista'
          example: 'ABC1234567'
    RouteStop:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma parada na rota de entrega'
      properties:
        stopId:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da parada'
          example: 'stop_1'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço físico da parada'
          example: 'Avenida Paulista, 1000, São Paulo, SP'
        scheduledArrival:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário programado para chegada na parada'
          example: '2024-06-01T14:30:00Z'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Estado atual da parada na rota (ex: pending, completed)'
          example: 'completed'
    TruckTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta detalhada do rastreamento do caminhão'
      properties:
        truckId:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do caminhão'
          example: 'truck_102'
        location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speed:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Velocidade atual do caminhão em km/h'
          example: 65.5
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Driver'
        routeStops:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista das paradas no trajeto do caminhão'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RouteStop'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Co-working Space Desk Availability Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    User:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a user occupying a desk or reserving a room'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the user'
          example: 'user_567'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
    OccupiedHotDesk:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a currently occupied hot desk'
      properties:
        desk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the hot desk'
          example: 'hotdesk_101'
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        occupied_since:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 timestamp when the desk became occupied'
          example: '2024-06-20T09:00:00Z'
    ReservedBy:
      type: object
      description: 'User details for who reserved the meeting room'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the user reserving the room'
          example: 'user_123'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user reserving the room'
          example: 'Carol Smith'
    MeetingRoomReservation:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a meeting room reservation'
      properties:
        reservation_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique reservation identifier'
          example: 'res_789'
        room_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the meeting room'
          example: 'Conference Room A'
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Meeting start time in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-06-20T14:00:00Z'
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Meeting end time in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-06-20T15:00:00Z'
        reserved_by:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReservedBy'
    DeskAvailabilityReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Report of desk availability including floor plans, hot desk occupancy, and upcoming meetings'
      properties:
        floor_plan_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier of the floor plan'
          example: 'floor_12'
        floor_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Descriptive name of the floor'
          example: 'Main Floor'
        occupied_hot_desks:
          type: array
          description: 'List of currently occupied hot desks on this floor'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OccupiedHotDesk'
        upcoming_meeting_reservations:
          type: array
          description: 'Upcoming meeting room reservations on this floor'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MeetingRoomReservation'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: University Student Dashboard Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CompletedCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um curso concluído pelo estudante'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Código único do curso'
          example: 'ENG101'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso concluído'
          example: 'Cálculo I'
        grade:
          type: string
          description: 'Nota obtida no curso'
          example: 'A'
        year_completed:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano em que o curso foi concluído'
          example: 2021
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico acadêmico do estudante incluindo cursos completados e média'
      properties:
        program:
          type: string
          description: 'Programa ou curso de graduação'
          example: 'Engenharia de Computação'
        completed_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de cursos já concluídos pelo estudante'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CompletedCourse'
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Média geral ponderada'
          example: 3.75
    CurrentEnrolledCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um curso em que o estudante está matriculado atualmente'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Código do curso'
          example: 'ENG201'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso'
          example: 'Circuitos Elétricos'
        credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de créditos do curso'
          example: 4
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do professor responsável'
          example: 'Prof. João Pereira'
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações financeiras relacionadas à mensalidade do estudante'
      properties:
        tuition_due:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Valor devido da mensalidade em reais'
          example: 1250.75
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data limite para pagamento'
          example: '2024-07-10'
        payment_status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual do pagamento da mensalidade'
          example: 'pending'
    StudentDashboardResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta do dashboard do estudante universitário'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do estudante'
          example: 'stu_20245'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do estudante'
          example: 'Ana Silva'
        academic_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        current_enrolled_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de cursos em que o estudante está matriculado no momento'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CurrentEnrolledCourse'
        financial_status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'
