assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Food Delivery Order Status
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Localização em tempo real do entregador'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude da localização do entregador'
          example: -23.55052
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude da localização do entregador'
          example: -46.633308
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Momento em que a localização foi registrada'
          example: '2024-06-01T14:22:33Z'
    Courier:
      type: object
      description: 'Dados do entregador'
      properties:
        courier_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do entregador'
          example: 'C7890'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do entregador'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
    Restaurant:
      type: object
      description: 'Perfil do restaurante associado à ordem'
      properties:
        restaurant_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do restaurante'
          example: 'R102'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do restaurante'
          example: 'Sabores do Brasil'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço completo do restaurante'
          example: 'Av. Paulista, 1000, São Paulo, SP'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Telefone para contato do restaurante'
          example: '+55 11 99999-8888'
    OrderedDish:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre um prato pedido'
      properties:
        dish_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do prato'
          example: 'D500'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do prato'
          example: 'Feijoada Completa'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade pedida do prato'
          example: 1
        dietary_notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Observações dietéticas especiais relacionadas ao prato'
          example: 'Gluten-free'
    OrderStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Status completo do pedido incluindo detalhes do entregador, restaurante e pratos'
      properties:
        order_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do pedido'
          example: 'OD123456789'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Estado atual do pedido'
          example: 'On the way'
        courier:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Courier'
        restaurant:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Restaurant'
        ordered_dishes:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de pratos pedidos'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderedDish'
paths: {}

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes anatômicos do dente do paciente'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número do dente seguindo a notação anatômica'
          example: '18'
        tooth_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do dente'
          example: 'Third Molar'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Estado atual do dente (ex: Presente, Ausente)'
          example: 'Present'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Condição clínica do dente'
          example: 'Healthy'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Registro de procedimentos dentários realizados'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do procedimento'
          example: 'proc_1001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do procedimento'
          example: 'Dental Cleaning'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que o procedimento foi realizado'
          example: '2023-01-15'
        dentist:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do dentista responsável pelo procedimento'
          example: 'Dr. Silva'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Observações adicionais sobre o procedimento'
          example: 'Routine cleaning, no issues found'
    ReminderDetails:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes sobre o lembrete enviado para limpeza dental'
      properties:
        sent_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que o lembrete foi enviado'
          example: '2024-06-25'
        method:
          type: string
          description: 'Método pelo qual o lembrete foi enviado'
          example: 'SMS'
        message:
          type: string
          description: 'Conteúdo da mensagem do lembrete'
          example: 'Reminder: Your dental cleaning is scheduled for 2024-07-10'
    UpcomingCleaningsMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadados sobre futuras limpezas dentais agendadas'
      properties:
        next_cleaning_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data da próxima limpeza agendada'
          example: '2024-07-10'
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o lembrete já foi enviado'
          example: true
        reminder_details:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReminderDetails'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico completo do paciente da clínica dental'
      properties:
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de procedimentos dentários passados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
        upcoming_cleanings_metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningsMetadata'

info:
  title: Veterinary Appointment API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Pet:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do animal de estimação'
      properties:
        species:
          type: string
          description: 'Espécie do animal'
          example: 'Cachorro'
        breed:
          type: string
          description: 'Raça do animal'
          example: 'Labrador Retriever'
        weight_kg:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Peso do animal em quilogramas'
          example: 25.6

      type: object
      description: 'Informações de contato do proprietário'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do proprietário'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de telefone do proprietário com código de país'
          example: '+55 11 91234-5678'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Endereço de email do proprietário'
          example: 'carlos.silva@email.com'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes sobre o procedimento agendado'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'User profile details'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'u123456789'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'User email address'
          example: 'alice.johnson@example.com'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'User phone number with country code'
          example: '+1234567890'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single transaction'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique transaction identifier'
          example: 'tx1001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 date and time of the transaction'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:32:00Z'
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Transaction type, e.g. payment or top_up'
          example: 'payment'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Monetary amount of the transaction'
          example: -120.50
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code in ISO 4217 format'
          example: 'USD'
        merchant:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: 'Merchant name or null if not applicable'
          example: 'Amazon'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status of the transaction'
          example: 'completed'
    Statement:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital wallet statement containing user profile, current balance and recent transactions'
      properties:
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current balance amount in the wallet'
          example: 2543.75
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code in ISO 4217 format for the balance'
          example: 'USD'
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the last 3 recent transactions'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Dados demográficos do paciente'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do paciente'
          example: '123456789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do paciente'
          example: 'Maria Silva'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Idade do paciente em anos'
          example: 34
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gênero do paciente'
          example: 'female'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Intervalo normal para o biomarcador sanguíneo'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor mínimo considerado normal'
          example: 12.0
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor máximo considerado normal'
          example: 16.0
    BloodBiomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Informação individual de um biomarcador sanguíneo'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do biomarcador'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor medido do biomarcador'
          example: 13.5
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unidade de medida do biomarcador'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Assinatura digital do patologista que revisou o exame'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do patologista'
          example: 'Dr. João Pereira'
        signed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora da assinatura'
          example: '2024-04-21T14:00:00Z'
        digital_signature:
          type: string
          description: 'Assinatura digital codificada em formato hexadecimal'
          example: '3045022100dff9b8ea7fcb4a8610...'
    LaboratoryTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Resultado completo do exame laboratorial'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientDemographics'
        test_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora da realização do exame'
          example: '2024-04-21T10:30:00Z'
        blood_biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de biomarcadores sanguíneos analisados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BloodBiomarker'
        pathologist_signature:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'
paths: {}

system: Você é um Arquiteto de Software especialista em documentação de APIs. Converta o JSON de entrada em uma especificação OpenAPI 3.0 em formato YAML. Estruture corretamente os componentes (schemas) e garanta a tipagem rigorosa. Retorne APENAS o código YAML válido, sem comentários adicionais.
user: {"title": "Inception", "runtime_minutes": 148, "director": {"name": "Christopher Nolan", "birth_year": 1970}, "cast": [{"name": "Leonardo DiCaprio", "character": "Dom Cobb"}, {"name": "Joseph Gordon-Levitt", "character": "Arthur"}], "links": [{"rel": "self", "href": "https://api.streaming.com/movies/1"}, {"rel": "related", "href": "https://api.streaming.com/movies/2"}]}
assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Movie API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Director:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o diretor do filme'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do diretor'
          example: 'Christopher Nolan'
        birth_year:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano de nascimento do diretor'
          example: 1970
    CastMember:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre um membro do elenco'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do ator ou atriz'
          example: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'
        character:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do personagem interpretado'
          example: 'Dom Cobb'
    Link:
      type: object
      description: 'Estrutura HATEOAS para links relacionados'
      properties:
        rel:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de relação do link em relação ao recurso atual'
          example: 'self'
        href:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL do recurso vinculado'
          example: 'https://api.streaming.com/movies/1'
    Movie:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do filme na plataforma de streaming'
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título do filme'
          example: 'Inception'
        runtime_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duração do filme em minutos'
          example: 148
        director:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Director'
        cast:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos membros do elenco'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CastMember'
        links:
          type: array
          description: 'Links HATEOAS relacionados ao filme'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Link'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Histórico do Paciente da Clínica Odontológica
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do dente incluindo número, condição da superfície e notas adicionais'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número do dente seguindo a notação odontológica'
          example: '16'
        surface_condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Condição da superfície do dente'
          example: 'Decayed'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Observações extras relacionadas ao dente'
          example: 'Lesão em área oclusal'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Procedimentos odontológicos realizados anteriormente no paciente'
      properties:
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do procedimento odontológico'
          example: 'Obturação'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que o procedimento foi realizado'
          example: '2023-01-15'
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número do dente envolvido no procedimento ou all para geral'
          example: '16'
        materials_used:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: 'Materiais utilizados durante o procedimento, se aplicável'
          example: 'Amálgama'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Anotações adicionais sobre o procedimento'
          example: 'Procedimento bem sucedido'
    UpcomingCleaningMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadados sobre o agendamento da próxima limpeza'
      properties:
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o lembrete foi enviado ao paciente'
          example: true
        reminder_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que o lembrete foi enviado'
          example: '2024-07-10'
        contact_method:
          type: string
          description: 'Método usado para contato com o paciente'
          example: 'SMS'
    UpcomingCleaning:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do próximo agendamento de limpeza dental'
      properties:
        next_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data agendada para a próxima limpeza'
          example: '2024-07-15'
        location:
          type: string
          description: 'Local onde o procedimento será realizado'
          example: 'Clínica Central'
        instructions:
          type: string
          description: 'Instruções prévias para o paciente'
          example: 'Evitar alimentos após meia-noite'
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningMetadata'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico odontológico completo do paciente incluindo mapa dentário, procedimentos realizados e limpezas agendadas'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do paciente'
          example: '123456'
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de procedimentos anteriores realizados no paciente'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
        upcoming_cleanings:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaning'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Smart City Traffic Camera Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    VehicleDetected:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a detected vehicle type and its count'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of the vehicle detected'
          example: 'car'
        count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of vehicles of this type detected'
          example: 34
    PedestrianCrossing:
      type: object
      description: 'Details regarding pedestrian crossing alerts at the intersection'
      properties:
        crosswalk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the pedestrian crosswalk'
          example: 'cross_09'
        alert_active:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if a pedestrian crossing alert is currently active'
          example: true
        alert_message:
          type: string
          description: 'Message displayed when the pedestrian crossing alert is active'
          example: 'Pedestrian crossing active, vehicles must yield'
    TrafficCameraReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Report from a smart city traffic camera including congestion, vehicles, and pedestrian alerts'
      properties:
        intersection_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the traffic intersection'
          example: 'int_1257'
        congestion_level:
          type: string
          description: 'Current congestion level at the intersection'
          example: 'high'
        vehicles_detected:
          type: array
          description: 'List of detected vehicle types and counts'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/VehicleDetected'
        pedestrian_crossings:
          type: array
          description: 'List of pedestrian crossing alerts at the intersection'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PedestrianCrossing'

      properties:

          description: 'Unique identifier of the user'
          example: 'U123'

          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'alice.johnson@example.com'
    HotDeskOccupied:
      type: object
      description: 'Currently occupied hot-desk details'
      properties:
        desk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier of the hot-desk'
          example: 'HD101'
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        occupied_since:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 date-time when the desk started being occupied'
          example: '2024-06-10T09:00:00Z'
    FloorPlan:
      type: object
      description: 'Floor plan details with occupied hot-desks'
      properties:
        floor_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the floor'
          example: 'F1'

          type: string

          example: 'open space with desks near windows'

          type: array
          description: 'List of currently occupied hot-desks on the floor'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/HotDeskOccupied'

      type: object
      description: 'User details for meeting room reservation'

        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the user who reserved the room'
          example: 'U126'

          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the reserving user'
          example: 'David Nguyen'
        email:

          description: 'Email address of the reserving user'

info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações demográficas básicas do paciente'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do paciente'
          example: 'patient_12345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do paciente'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        date_of_birth:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data de nascimento do paciente'
          example: '1980-05-12'
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gênero do paciente'
          example: 'Male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Faixa normal de valores para o marcador biológico'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor mínimo considerado normal'
          example: 13.5
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor máximo considerado normal'
          example: 17.5
    BiomarkerResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Resultado individual de um marcador biológico no exame'
      properties:
        biomarker_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do marcador biológico'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor medido do marcador'
          example: 14.2
        units:
          type: string
          description: 'Unidade de medida do valor'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
        interpretation:
          type: string
          description: 'Interpretação clínica do valor'
          example: 'Normal'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Assinatura digital do patologista que revisou o resultado'
      properties:
        pathologist_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do patologista'
          example: 'path_789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do patologista'
          example: 'Dra. Mariana Costa'
        digital_signature:
          type: string
          description: 'Assinatura digital codificada em base64'
          example: 'MEUCIQD5q4XV0pPb8bY2hFX+NLmBiaWLZGDJ4FtozdXY5Vg+q7AIgdxI84g6u/5jXQDxQXJw7yxsfzi6lYjQLl7TROJq6rvR8='
    LaboratoryTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Resultado completo do exame laboratorial do paciente'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientDemographics'
        test_results:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de resultados dos biomarcadores sanguíneos'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BiomarkerResult'
        reviewed_by:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'

info:
  title: Restaurant Reservation API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    DietaryRestrictions:
      type: object
      description: 'Dietary restrictions for the customer'
      properties:
        vegetarian:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer is vegetarian'
          example: true
        gluten_free:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer requires gluten-free food'
          example: false
        nut_allergy:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer has nut allergies'
          example: true
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the customer making the reservation'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the customer'
          example: 'John Doe'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreorderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a single pre-ordered menu item'
      properties:
        item_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the menu item'
          example: 'dish_101'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the pre-ordered dish'
          example: 'Quinoa Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of portions ordered'
          example: 2
        special_requests:
          type: string
          description: 'Any special preparation requests for the item'
          example: 'No dressing'
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'API response schema for restaurant reservations'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Assigned table number for the reservation'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        preordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'List of pre-ordered menu items'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreorderedItem'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: University Student Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CourseTaken:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a completed course in academic history'
      properties:
        course_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the course'
          example: 'CS101'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the course'
          example: 'Introduction to Computer Science'
        grade:
          type: string
          description: 'Grade earned for the course'
          example: 'A'
        semester:
          type: string
          description: 'Semester when the course was taken'
          example: 'Fall 2022'
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Academic history including GPA, completed credits and courses taken'
      properties:
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Grade Point Average'
          example: 3.75
        completed_credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Total completed credit hours'
          example: 90
        courses_taken:
          type: array
          description: 'List of completed courses'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CourseTaken'
    CurrentCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a currently enrolled course'
      properties:
        course_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the course'
          example: 'PHYS150'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the course'
          example: 'General Physics I'
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the course instructor'
          example: 'Dr. Smith'
        credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of credits for the course'
          example: 4
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Financial information related to tuition and payments'
      properties:
        tuition_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Outstanding tuition balance in USD'
          example: 1200.50
        scholarship_received:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Total scholarship amount received'
          example: 3000
        last_payment_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of the last tuition payment'
          example: '2024-05-10'
        payment_status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current payment status'
          example: 'Pending'
    StudentDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'University student dashboard containing academic, current courses, and financial data'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the student'
          example: 'stu_20245'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the student'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        academic_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        current_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Courses the student is currently enrolled in'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CurrentCourse'
        financial_status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Real Estate Property Listing
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Address:
      type: object
      description: 'Physical address of the property'
      properties:
        street:
          type: string
          description: 'Street address'
          example: '1234 Elm Street'
        city:
          type: string
          description: 'City where the property is located'
          example: 'Springfield'
        state:
          type: string
          description: 'State of the property location'
          example: 'IL'
        zip_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Postal code'
          example: '62704'
    ArchitecturalSpecs:
      type: object
      description: 'Architectural specifications of the property'
      properties:
        year_built:
          type: integer
          description: 'The year the property was built'
          example: 1998
        square_feet:
          type: integer
          description: 'Total living space area in square feet'
          example: 2850
        bedrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of bedrooms'
          example: 4
        bathrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of bathrooms'
          example: 3
        has_fireplace:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the property has a fireplace'
          example: true
        heating_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of heating system'
          example: 'Central'
        cooling_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of cooling system'
          example: 'Central Air'
    ImageUrls:
      type: object
      description: 'High-resolution image URLs and description'
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Description of the image subject'
          example: 'Front view of the property'
        urls:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of URLs to high-resolution images'
          items:
            type: string
            format: uri
            example: 'https://example.com/images/property123_front_1.jpg'
    RealtorContact:
      type: object
      description: 'Contact information of the assigned realtor'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the realtor'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Phone number with country code'
          example: '+1-555-123-4567'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email address of the realtor'
          example: 'jane.doe@realestateco.com'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Real estate license number'
          example: 'RE123456789'
    PropertyListing:
      type: object
      description: 'Comprehensive real estate property listing'
      properties:
        property_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the property'
          example: 'PROP123456'
        address:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Address'
        architectural_specs:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArchitecturalSpecs'
        images:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of image groups with descriptions and URLs'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ImageUrls'
        realtor_contact:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/RealtorContact'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Imóvel Residencial
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ArchitecturalSpecs:
      type: object
      description: 'Especificações arquitetônicas do imóvel'
      properties:
        area_sq_meters:
          type: integer
          description: 'Área total do imóvel em metros quadrados'
          example: 350
        bedrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade de quartos'
          example: 4
        bathrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade de banheiros'
          example: 3
        year_built:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano de construção'
          example: 2018
        has_garage:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o imóvel possui garagem'
          example: true
        energy_efficiency_rating:
          type: string
          description: 'Classificação de eficiência energética'
          example: 'A'
    Image:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes da imagem de alta resolução do imóvel'
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL da imagem de alta resolução'
          example: 'https://realestate.example.com/images/property123_front.jpg'
        caption:
          type: string
          description: 'Legenda ou descrição da imagem'
          example: 'Vista frontal da casa'
    Realtor:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do corretor responsável pelo imóvel'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do corretor'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de telefone do corretor'
          example: '+55 11 91234-5678'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email do corretor'
          example: 'carlos.silva@realestate.com.br'
        office:
          type: string
          description: 'Localização do escritório do corretor'
          example: 'São Paulo Downtown'
    PropertyListing:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes completos do imóvel para venda'
      properties:
        property_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do imóvel'
          example: 'PR123456'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título ou nome do anúncio do imóvel'
          example: 'Luxury Family House with Garden'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Descrição detalhada do imóvel'
          example: 'A spacious family house located in the serene suburbs with modern architectural design.'
        architectural_specs:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArchitecturalSpecs'
        images:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de imagens de alta resolução do imóvel'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Image'
        realtor:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Realtor'

          format: float
          description: 'Average speed of detected vehicles in km/h'
          example: 23.5
    PedestrianCrossing:
      type: object
      description: 'Information on a pedestrian crossing alert status'

          type: string

    TrafficCameraReport:

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Logistics Fleet Tracking API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Coordenadas GPS atuais do caminhão de entrega'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude atual do veículo'
          example: -23.55052
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude atual do veículo'
          example: -46.633308
    Driver:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o motorista do caminhão'
      properties:
        driver_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do motorista'
          example: 'drv_501'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do motorista'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número da carteira de habilitação do motorista'
          example: 'AB1234567'
    RouteStop:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma parada no trajeto do caminhão'
      properties:
        stop_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da parada'
          example: 'stop_1'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço completo da parada'
          example: 'Rua Augusta, 1500, São Paulo, SP'
        expected_arrival:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário estimado de chegada na parada (UTC)'
          example: '2024-06-05T14:30:00Z'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual da parada (e.g., pending, completed)'
          example: 'pending'
    TruckTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta contendo a localização, velocidade, motorista e paradas atuais do caminhão'
      properties:
        truck_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do caminhão'
          example: 'truck_101'
        location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speed_kmh:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Velocidade atual do caminhão em quilômetros por hora'
          example: 65.5
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Driver'
        route_stops:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de paradas previstas na rota do caminhão'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RouteStop'

info:
  title: Real Estate Property Listing
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ArchitecturalSpecs:
      type: object
      description: 'Especificações arquitetônicas da propriedade'
      properties:
        area:
          type: integer
          description: 'Área total da propriedade'
          example: 280
        units:
          type: string
          description: 'Unidades de medida da área'
          example: 'square meters'
        bedrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de quartos'
          example: 4
        bathrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de banheiros'
          example: 3
        yearBuilt:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano de construção'
          example: 2021
        hasGarage:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica a presença de garagem'
          example: true
        flooring:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de piso'
          example: 'Hardwood'
        energyEfficiencyRating:
          type: string
          description: 'Classificação de eficiência energética'
          example: 'A+'
    Image:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma imagem da propriedade'
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL da imagem em alta resolução'

          type: string
          description: 'Resolução da imagem'
          example: '1920x1080'

          type: string
          description: 'Descrição da imagem'
          example: 'Front view of the property'

          example: 'dir_23'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do diretor'
          example: 'Ana Souza'

      properties:

          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do ator'
          example: 'act_101'

          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do ator'
          example: 'Carlos Pereira'

          description: 'Papel desempenhado pelo ator no filme'

      description: 'Objeto representando um link HATEOAS'

          type: string
          description: 'URL para o recurso relacionado'
          example: 'https://api.streaming.com/movies/related/1'
    MovieResponse:
      type: object

          description: 'Título do filme'

        links:

          description: 'Links HATEOAS para filmes relacionados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Link'

          type: string

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: E-sports Match Summary
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    TeamScores:
      type: object
      description: 'Scores of the competing teams'
      properties:
        teamA:
          type: integer
          description: 'Points scored by Team A'
          example: 16
        teamB:
          type: integer
          description: 'Points scored by Team B'
          example: 12
    PlayerStat:
      type: object
      description: 'Statistics for an individual player in the match'
      properties:
        playerId:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the player'
          example: 'player1'
        kills:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of kills performed by the player'
          example: 20
        deaths:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of times the player died'
          example: 5
        assists:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of assists the player made'
          example: 7
    MatchEvent:
      type: object
      description: 'Key events occurring during the match timeline'
      properties:
        time:
          type: string
          description: 'Timestamp of the event in HH:MM:SS format'
          example: '00:05:12'
        eventType:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of event during the match'
          example: 'Kill'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Detailed description of the event'
          example: 'Player1 eliminated Player3'
        involvedPlayers:
          type: array
          description: 'List of player IDs involved in the event'
          items:
            type: string
          example: ['player1', 'player3']
    MatchSummary:
      type: object
      description: 'Summary of the competitive e-sports match including scores, player stats, and timeline events'
      properties:
        teamScores:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/TeamScores'
        playerStats:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of player statistics objects'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PlayerStat'
        matchTimeline:
          type: array
          description: 'Chronological list of key match events'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MatchEvent'

system: Você é um Arquiteto de Software especialista em documentação de APIs. Converta o JSON de entrada em uma especificação OpenAPI 3.0 em formato YAML. Estruture corretamente os componentes (schemas) e garanta a tipagem rigorosa. Retorne APENAS o código YAML válido, sem comentários adicionais.
user: {"table_number": 12, "customer": {"name": "Ana Silva", "dietary_restrictions": {"vegetarian": true, "gluten_free": false, "allergies": ["peanuts", "shellfish"]}}, "pre_ordered_items": [{"item_name": "Grilled Vegetable Salad", "quantity": 2, "special_instructions": "No dressing"}, {"item_name": "Shrimp Pasta", "quantity": 1, "special_instructions": "Extra spicy"}]}
assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Resposta da Reserva de Restaurante
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    DietaryRestrictions:
      type: object
      description: 'Restrições alimentares do cliente'
      properties:
        vegetarian:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente é vegetariano'
          example: true
        gluten_free:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente é intolerante ao glúten'
          example: false
        allergies:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de alergias alimentares do cliente'
          items:
            type: string
            description: 'Nome da alergia alimentar'
            example: 'peanuts'
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do cliente da reserva'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do cliente'
          example: 'Ana Silva'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreOrderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Item pré-encomendado pelo cliente'
      properties:
        item_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do item pré-encomendado'
          example: 'Grilled Vegetable Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade do item encomendada'
          example: 2
        special_instructions:
          type: string
          description: 'Instruções especiais para o preparo do item'
          example: 'No dressing'
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta da API para uma reserva de restaurante'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número da mesa reservada'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        pre_ordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de itens pré-encomendados na reserva'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreOrderedItem'

info:
  title: Streaming Platform Movie API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Director:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the movie director'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the director'
          example: 'Christopher Nolan'
        birth_year:
          type: integer
          description: 'Year when the director was born'
          example: 1970
    CastMember:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a cast member in the movie'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the cast member'
          example: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'
        role:
          type: string
          description: 'Character played by the cast member'
          example: 'Cobb'
    Link:
      type: object
      description: 'HATEOAS link to related resources'
      properties:
        rel:
          type: string
          description: 'Relation type of the link'
          example: 'related'
        href:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL of the linked resource'
          example: 'https://api.streamingplatform.com/movies/42'
        method:
          type: string
          description: 'HTTP method to use with the URL'
          example: 'GET'
    Movie:
      type: object
      description: 'Detailed information about a movie'
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the movie'
          example: 'Inception'
        runtime_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duration of the movie in minutes'
          example: 148
        director:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Director'
        cast:
          type: array
          description: 'List of cast members in the movie'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CastMember'
        links:
          type: array
          description: 'Collection of HATEOAS links for related movies'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Link'

          type: integer
          description: 'Ano de construção'

          type: string
          description: 'Material predominante da construção'

      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes da imagem de alta resolução'
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL da imagem em alta resolução'

          type: string
          description: 'Resolução da imagem'

      type: object
      description: 'Informações detalhadas da propriedade imobiliária'

        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da propriedade'

          type: string
          description: 'Título ou nome da propriedade'
          example: 'Modern Family House'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'User profile details for the digital wallet'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'user_12345'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the user'
          example: '+1234567890'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'A single recent transaction record in the wallet statement'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'txn_001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 date and time of the transaction'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:22:00Z'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Transaction amount; negative for debits, positive for credits'
          example: -50.00
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'ISO currency code for the transaction amount'
          example: 'USD'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Description or memo associated with the transaction'
          example: 'Grocery Store'
        transaction_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of the transaction indicating debit or credit'
          example: 'debit'
    WalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Current digital wallet statement containing balance, user profile, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current available balance in the digital wallet'
          example: 1520.75
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the last 3 recent transactions'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Student Progress Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    QuizScore:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single quiz score'
      properties:
        quiz_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the quiz'
          example: 'quiz_001'
        score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Achieved quiz score'
          example: 85
        max_score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Maximum possible score for the quiz'
          example: 100
        passed:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates whether the quiz was passed'
          example: true
    Certificate:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about an unlocked digital certificate'
      properties:
        certificate_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the certificate'
          example: 'cert_101'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the certificate'
          example: 'Introduction to AI'
        date_unlocked:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the certificate was unlocked'
          example: '2024-05-12'
    StudentProgressReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Report of student progress within a course'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the student'
          example: 'stu_12345'
        course_progress:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Percentage of course completion'
          example: 78.5
        quizzes:
          type: array
          description: 'List of quiz scores'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/QuizScore'
        certificates:
          type: array
          description: 'List of unlocked certificates'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Certificate'

info:
  title: Resposta de Reserva de Restaurante
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    DietaryRestrictions:
      type: object
      description: 'Restrições alimentares do cliente'
      properties:
        gluten_free:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente é intolerante ao glúten'
          example: true
        lactose_intolerant:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente tem intolerância à lactose'
          example: false
        vegetarian:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o cliente é vegetariano'
          example: true
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do cliente da reserva'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do cliente'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreOrderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Item pré-pedido pelo cliente'
      properties:
        item_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do item pré-pedido'
          example: 'Salada Caesar'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade do item pré-pedido'
          example: 2
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Observações ou modificações para o item'
          example: 'Sem croutons'
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta contendo os detalhes da reserva'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número da mesa reservada'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        pre_ordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de itens pré-pedidos pelo cliente'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreOrderedItem'

          description: 'Valor estimado do imóvel em moeda local'

        valuation_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que a avaliação foi realizada'
          example: '2024-04-15'

  title: University Student Dashboard Response

components:
  schemas:
    CompletedCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'A course that the student has completed'
      properties:
        courseCode:
          type: string
          description: 'The code identifier for the course'
          example: 'CS101'
        courseName:
          type: string
          description: 'The full name of the completed course'
          example: 'Introduction to Computer Science'
        grade:
          type: string
          description: 'The grade obtained in the course'
          example: 'A'
        semester:
          type: string
          description: 'The academic semester when the course was completed'
          example: 'Fall 2022'
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'The academic background and performance details of the student'
      properties:
        completedCourses:
          type: array
          description: 'List of courses the student has completed'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CompletedCourse'
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'The cumulative Grade Point Average of the student'
          example: 3.7
    EnrolledCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'A course in which the student is currently enrolled'
      properties:
        courseCode:
          type: string
          description: 'The unique code of the enrolled course'
          example: 'CS202'
        courseName:
          type: string
          description: 'The name of the enrolled course'
          example: 'Data Structures'
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'The name of the course instructor'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Smith'
        schedule:
          type: string
          description: 'The schedule for the course sessions'
          example: 'Mon/Wed 10:00-11:30'
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the student’s tuition payment status'
      properties:
        tuitionPaid:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'The amount of tuition paid so far in USD'
          example: 6000
        tuitionDue:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'The outstanding tuition amount still due in USD'
          example: 1500
        dueDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'The due date for remaining tuition payment'
          example: '2024-07-15'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'The current status of the tuition payment'
          example: 'Partial Payment'
    StudentDashboardResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'The overall response object for the student dashboard containing academic and financial information'
      properties:
        studentId:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the student'
          example: 'S12345678'
        fullName:
          type: string
          description: 'Student’s full name'
          example: 'John Doe'
        academicHistory:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        currentEnrolledCourses:
          type: array
          description: 'List of courses the student is currently enrolled in'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/EnrolledCourse'
        financialStatus:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'

          items:

      type: object
      description: 'Objeto raiz contendo o resumo da partida'
      properties:
        match_summary:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/MatchSummary'
